case_title: ERIK VAN DEN AKKER VS. JULIO CESAR CARMONA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$165.00) SERVED SEP-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARMONA, JULIO CESAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAN DEN AKKER, ERIK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CARMONA, JULIO CESAR AS FURTHER EXPLAINED IN THE JUDGMENT MEMORANDUM IN CSM-18-859039, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED HIS BURDEN OF PROVING HE IS ENTITLED TO RENT FOR DEFENDANT'S OCCUPANCY OF THE ROOM AT ISSUE IN THIS CASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 11/26/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY VAN DEN AKKER, ERIK AS TO DEFENDANT CARMONA, JULIO CESAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF ERIK VAN DEN AKKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JULIO CESAR CARMONA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
